notes: Territory contest. A world's owning faction is no longer permanent — if its owner falls into open War with a rival, a 🚩 control meter starts building (faster the deeper the war, and faster still if the world is pirate-plagued) and, left unchecked, the world actually changes hands. Cool the war back to peace and a contest fades on its own; no faction can ever be conquered down to its last world. Tracked on the world's Galaxy pill, an Operations board row, and a new Politics-tab 'Contested Worlds' card.
